_comment: Ported from V1 backup api-format workflow. Per-branch positive encoders use `from: main_prompt` + `prefix:` to bake the angle keyword in front of the user's subject description. The shared UNet/CLIP/VAE/LoRAs are pinned with literal: bindings to the V1-era filenames; edit via the sidebar if you have different versions installed.
label: Story 4
description: Qwen-Image-Edit 2509 + Next-Scene LoRA (@0.75) + Lightning 4-step. One workflow, 4 frames produced sequentially - each frame N+1 is generated from frame N as the reference image. The user's main_prompt is prefixed with the LoRA's canonical 'Next Scene:' trigger. Requires the 2509 base UNet + Next-Scene LoRA in models/loras/.

prompt.default: continue the action naturally, preserve identity and environment
continue the action naturally, preserve identity and environment
